validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'pip install uv --break-system-packages' then 'python3 -m uv'

coverage_baseline.notes: 7 ANSI failures: test_unpacker.py (4 TestUnpackCmdLogging), test_update_command.py (2 TestUpdateCommand). Multiple fix PRs opened but not yet merged.

yaml_pollution_note: Running tests with --cov causes PyYAML global state corruption from some earlier test. Affects parse_skill_file and parse_primitive_file calls when run in full suite with coverage. Not a new issue. Tests pass without --cov.
ansi_strip_note: 7 ANSI failures: Rich Console outputs bold ANSI codes in Click CliRunner capture. Fix: add _strip_ansi() helper (re.sub r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*m', '') to test assertions. Multiple PRs created but not merged by maintainer.

testing_backlog.notes: Uncovered: _atomic_write (263-275), _update_gitignore_for_apm_modules (278-307), _load_apm_config (314-320), _list_available_scripts (331-336). Pure I/O - easy to test, high value as shared by all commands.
STATUS_SYMBOLS verified, uncovered edge cases in _rich_echo, _rich_error, _rich_warning fallback paths. console.py:15-20, 27-30, 63-65, 86-106, 137-145.
Almost fully covered now. Uncovered: _extract_primitive_name structured .agent.md (206-209, 220, 225). PR #254 was closed.
PR #221 open. Remaining uncovered: display/formatting paths (264-333, 436-518, 759-801) - require distributed compiler stack
Branch test-assist/core-operations-runtime-manager-coverage exists - may have open PR
Branch test-assist/registry-operations-coverage exists - may have open PR. Heavy network dependency.
7 pre-existing ANSI test failures in test_unpacker.py + test_update_command.py. Multiple fix PRs opened but not merged. May need maintainer discussion on approach.

completed_work.description: Updated testing backlog: identified commands/_helpers.py (59%) as high-value target for _atomic_write and _update_gitignore tests. Updated coverage baseline to 57% / 1778 tests. Created/updated monthly activity issue.
Fixed 7 failing tests by adding _strip_ansi() helper. PR not yet merged.
PR #254 created then closed. Added 54 unit tests for primitives/discovery.py (78%->97%) and parser.py (72%->76%).
Added 34 unit tests for agents_compiler.py (65%->82%). PR #221 still open.
